overview: A minimalistic, high-end personal portfolio website for Swarit Sawarkar, featuring a strict monochrome black/white/grey aesthetic with premium typography, signature-style hero name animations, and smooth scroll-triggered animations throughout.
features: Monochrome black/white/grey design with deep black background
Signature-style rolling reveal animation for the hero name
Timeline that unfolds like a story with animated progress line
Premium Inter typography with strong visual hierarchy
Fully responsive layout with breathable spacing
